title: Frogcrafting Fairy Totem
description: A Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild inspired totem replacement resource pack made for Frogcrafting.
body:
![Separator Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76fd838349e2eefaa42871f42acce22810e9a64e.png)
__A cute pink and green fairy as your Totem of Undying, designed for Frogcrafting's [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/frogcrafting) and [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@frogcrafting) channels!__

This pack remodels and retextures the totem of undying to a cute fairy reminiscent of BotW.  
It mirrors itself depending on the hand you're holding it in, is relatively unobtrusive, and can even be worn as a hat (using commands or some mod to do so).

![Frogcrafting Fairy Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SXAre5wv/images/1c4839524c62ff0f0147f2ac32dd128d236a0230.png)

*Check out [Frogcrafting's Hardcore Modpack](https://modrinth.com/project/frogcraftings-hardcore-modpack) to play with this resource pack (coming soon ™️)!*  
*Check out [Frocrafting Hotbar](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/frogcrafting-hotbar), it's used in the showcase images!*  
*Check out [Firefly to Fairy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/firefly-to-fairy) for more fairy goodness!*
